channel.title: Tal Paperin Insights
channel.description: Field notes on B2B sales, fractional CRO leadership, go-to-market and fixing broken revenue.

item.title: Fractional CRO vs Full-Time CRO: Which Does Your Company Actually Need?
item.description: A practical breakdown of when a fractional CRO beats a full-time hire, what each really costs, and how to tell which one your revenue stage calls for.
